$meta.note: Import this file in ankhor88 (Smart Import / ThingaFile) to get the CRM as a program thinga. The folder-named-crm convention: a thinga named 'crm' whose program facet points at the running app.

program.name: crm
program.description: Wholesale CRM — 11-view operator app (pro queue, Fill pipeline, outreach, map). Renders overlaid; zero cost to ankhor until launched.

note.content: Program thinga for the wholesale CRM. Start the CRM with `npm start` in wholesale-crm/, then Launch here. Health dot polls /api/health. Same-machine only by default; the CRM sets no X-Frame-Options, so the iframe renders fully.
